name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancelling with Auto NC Optimizer. Up to 30 hours battery life with quick charging.

name: Apple MacBook Air M3 13"
description: Supercharged by the M3 chip. Up to 18 hours of battery life, fanless design, and a stunning Liquid Retina display.

name: Samsung 65" QLED 4K Smart TV
description: Quantum Dot technology delivers a billion shades of color. Built-in Alexa and Google Assistant.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
description: 8K DPI sensor works on any surface including glass. Whisper-quiet clicks and ergonomic design.

name: iPad Pro 12.9" M4
description: The thinnest Apple product ever. Ultra Retina XDR OLED display, Apple Pencil Pro support, and M4 performance.

name: ASUS ROG Swift 27" Gaming Monitor
description: 1440p resolution at 165Hz with 1ms response time. G-Sync compatible with HDR support.

name: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
description: 200MP camera system, built-in S Pen, Snapdragon 8 Elite, and a 5000mAh battery.

name: Keychron Q3 Mechanical Keyboard
description: Tenkeyless layout, hot-swappable switches, QMK/VIA compatible, and aluminum body.

name: Sonos Era 300 Speaker
description: Spatial audio with Dolby Atmos. Six-driver architecture for room-filling sound from every angle.

name: GoPro HERO13 Black
description: 5.3K60 video, HyperSmooth 6.0 stabilization, waterproof to 10m, and a 2-hour battery life.

name: Dell XPS 15 9530
description: 15.6" OLED touch display, Intel Core i9, RTX 4070, 32GB RAM, and 1TB SSD.

name: Anker 737 Power Bank 140W
description: 24,000mAh, 140W output, charges MacBook in under 2 hours. Dual USB-C and USB-A ports.

name: Apple iPhone 16 Pro
description: A18 Pro chip, 48MP Fusion camera with 5x optical zoom, titanium design, and Action button.

name: Nvidia GeForce RTX 4070 Super
description: 12GB GDDR6X, DLSS 3.5, ray tracing, and 4K gaming performance at a mainstream price point.

name: WD Black SN850X 2TB NVMe SSD
description: PCIe Gen4, up to 7300MB/s read speed. Ideal for gaming and creative workloads.

name: Sony A7 IV Mirrorless Camera
description: 33MP full-frame sensor, 4K 60fps video, 759-point phase-detect AF, and 10fps burst shooting.

name: Jabra Evolve2 85 Headset
description: Professional-grade ANC, 37-hour battery, multipoint connection to 3 devices, and a foldable design.

name: Samsung Galaxy Tab S10+
description: 12.4" Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, DeX mode, and S Pen included.

name: Corsair Vengeance 32GB DDR5 RAM
description: DDR5-6000, CL30, dual-channel kit. Optimized for Intel and AMD platforms with XMP 3.0 support.

name: LG 34" UltraWide Curved Monitor
description: 3440x1440 IPS panel, 160Hz, 1ms GtG, HDR400, and Thunderbolt 4 connectivity.

name: Raspberry Pi 5 (8GB)
description: Quad-core Cortex-A76 at 2.4GHz, 8GB LPDDR4X RAM, PCIe 2.0, dual 4K display output.

name: Elgato Stream Deck MK.2
description: 15 customizable LCD keys, one-touch stream control, plugin ecosystem, and USB-C connection.

name: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 12
description: 14" 2.8K OLED, Intel Core Ultra 7, 32GB LPDDR5, 1TB SSD, and just 1.12kg.

name: Rode NT-USB+ Condenser Microphone
description: Studio-quality USB condenser mic with built-in DSP, 32-bit float recording, and headphone monitoring.

name: TP-Link Deco XE75 Pro Wi-Fi 6E Mesh
description: Tri-band 6E mesh system, covers up to 650m², 10Gbps backhaul, and easy app-based setup. 3-pack.

name: Apple Watch Series 10
description: Thinnest Apple Watch ever, larger Always-On display, sleep apnea detection, and 18-hour battery.

name: DJI Mini 4 Pro Drone
description: 4K HDR video, 20km transmission, omnidirectional obstacle sensing, and under 249g.

name: Garmin Fenix 8 Solar
description: Multi-sport GPS watch with solar charging, AMOLED display, dive computer, and 29-day battery life.

name: Seagate IronWolf Pro 8TB NAS HDD
description: 7200RPM, 256MB cache, rated for 24/7 NAS operation, and includes 3 years Rescue data recovery.

name: Philips Hue Starter Kit (4 bulbs)
description: White and color ambiance A60 bulbs with Hue Bridge. 16 million colors, voice and app control.

name: NZXT H9 Elite Mid-Tower Case
description: Dual-chamber layout, panoramic tempered glass, three 120mm fans included, and excellent cable management.

name: Belkin BoostCharge Pro 4-in-1 Charging Station
description: Simultaneously charges iPhone, Apple Watch, AirPods, and a fourth device. 15W MagSafe compatible.
